mentions.note: Caller Jimmy T asked about enterprise software; Cramer not into sector, last quarter 'not to be liked'; explicit sell.
Jennifer's portfolio: Cramer swaps it out along with MSFT; both having trading problems; wants to preserve capital and diversify away from enterprise software concentration.
Trading poorly alongside Microsoft; too similar positioning; Cramer recommends selling to preserve capital and add J&J and RTX for better diversification.
Stock bottoming per Cramer but likely to struggle this quarter; won't have huge year as market prefers hardware; upside present but software facing headwinds vs. hardware winners in AI cycle.
